name: Cheeseburger
ingredients: Ground beef (80/20), salt, black pepper, wheat burger bun, cheddar cheese slices, lettuce, tomato, onion, pickles, ketchup, mustard, mayonnaise
dietary: NOT gluten-free, NOT vegetarian, NOT vegan, NOT dairy-free, NOT egg-free

name: Buffalo Wings
ingredients: Chicken wings, all-purpose flour (optional coating), frying oil, butter, hot sauce, garlic powder, salt
dietary: NOT gluten-free, NOT vegetarian, NOT vegan, NOT dairy-free

name: BBQ Ribs
ingredients: Pork ribs, paprika, brown sugar, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, BBQ sauce
allergens: POSSIBLE SOY and/or GLUTEN depending on BBQ sauce brand — guests with severe allergies should check with their server
dietary: NOT vegetarian, NOT vegan. No major allergens in the dry rub itself.

name: Chicken Quesadilla
ingredients: Flour tortillas (wheat), grilled chicken breast, shredded cheese blend, bell peppers, onions, sour cream, salsa
allergens: GLUTEN (flour tortilla), DAIRY (cheese blend, sour cream)
dietary: NOT gluten-free, NOT vegetarian, NOT vegan, NOT dairy-free

name: Fish Tacos
ingredients: White fish (tilapia or cod), taco seasoning, corn tortillas, cabbage slaw, lime, sour cream or crema
dietary: GLUTEN-FREE (corn tortillas — best GF option on the menu!), NOT vegetarian, NOT vegan, NOT dairy-free
